error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
context_key: HTTP Request node for Vertex AI
title: Invalid JSON structure for Vertex AI image generation
symptom: The HTTP Request node returns a 400 error with 'Bad request - please check your parameters' when trying to generate an image using the Vertex AI API.
applies_when: Sending image generation request to Vertex AI
not_this_if: The request is correctly formatted according to the API documentation
root_cause: The error occurs because the JSON payload sent to the Vertex AI API does not conform to the expected structure. Specifically, the API requires the image data to be nested under an 'image' object that includes both 'bytesBase64Encoded' and 'mimeType'.
fix_steps: Modify the JSON payload to include 'referenceImage.image' with both 'bytesBase64Encoded' and 'mimeType'.
Ensure that the 'referenceType' is set to a valid enum like 'REFERENCE_TYPE_RAW'.
Use '.toJsonString()' for injecting values from n8n expressions to ensure valid JSON.
agent_instruction: Update the JSON structure in your HTTP Request node to match the required format for Vertex AI.
